title: Dekton Block Plane – Heavy Duty Steel, Adjustable Cutter, Durable Detachable Design for Woodworking, DIY Furniture Repair, Edge Trimming, Surface Polishing & Craft Projects
features: Durable Construction: Built with heavy-duty steel and a polished underside, designed for consistent performance and a comfortable hand feel during extended use.
Adjustable Cutter: The sharp blade depth can be easily adjusted to suit various woodworking tasks, from fine trimming to deeper surface smoothing.
Detachable Design: Features removable parts and screws, allowing quick blade alignment, cleaning, and maintenance for long-lasting functionality.
Durable Finish: Black matte spray finish and coated steel surface help protect the tool, maintaining quality and longevity over time.
Wide Application: Ideal for woodworking, craft projects, furniture repair, deburring, and polishing, making it a versatile addition to any workshop or DIY toolkit.
description: The Dekton Block Plane is a versatile woodworking hand tool crafted from heavy-duty steel for durability and reliable performance. Its polished underside offers smooth operation and a comfortable grip, even during longer projects. The sharp blade features an adjustable depth mechanism, allowing you to fine-tune the cutting level for precise trimming, surface smoothing, or deburring tasks. Its detachable design with screws makes it easy to realign or replace the blade, as well as clean the tool for continued use. A black matte spray finish provides a professional look while helping protect the surface and maintain tool quality over time. This block plane is suitable for a wide range of applications, including DIY woodworking, furniture repair, craft making, and polishing tasks, making it an essential tool for hobbyists, carpenters, and anyone working with wood.
